productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Girls Sea Princess Light Orange T-shirt
description: Composition Light orange top made of 100% cotton, has mock layered sleeves with a short light orange sleeve and a long red sleeve, v-neck with red binding and stripes and graphic print on the front Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Warm iron on reverse; do not iron on print It's all fun and games in this long sleeved top from Green Gold's chhota bheem collection. The cute picture of the Chhota Bheem characters make this the perfect tee for any child who love the sea-side. Crafted from pure cotton, this top offers exemplary comfort. Team it with denim trousers or shorts.
